data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Amazon uses a microservices architecture distributing services across numerous separate modules.
data.technical_spec: Service Oriented Architecture (SOA) with APIs for communication.

data.title: Scalable Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Amazon's backend is built on AWS leveraging elastic scaling and redundant systems.
data.technical_spec: AWS Elastic Load Balancing, Auto Scaling Groups.

data.title: Distributed Databases
data.description: Utilizes distributed database systems for handling transactions across diverse regions.

data.title: Edge Computing with CDNs
data.description: Content Delivery Networks (CDNs) are used to reduce latency and increase content delivery speeds.
data.technical_spec: Amazon CloudFront and AWS Edge Locations.

data.title: Robust Application Layer
data.description: Utilizes robust application layer to manage business logic and API requests.
data.technical_spec: Amazon API Gateway, AWS Lambda for serverless computing.
